title: Stew Detective
description: Shows suspicious stew effects in the tooltip.
body:
# Stew Detective
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/stew-detective)
[![codeberg](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/codeberg_vector.svg)](https://codeberg.org/Maganoos/stew-detective)

Stew Detective is a simple mod that adds a tooltip to suspicious stews that shows you the effects it has and their durations.

This may be considered a cheat on some servers - so do get permission before using it on multiplayer servers.
